content:
# iter-006 → next-iter recommendations

## P1 — Plan-side cleanup (do FIRST; blocks DAG accuracy + blueprint build)

### P1.1 Coverage debt: blueprint the 22 new Grassmannian helpers (`unmatched`=22)
All in `MR2223407ConstructionHilbertQuot/Functors.lean`, all proved, axiom-free, no sorry. Parent
block is `def:grassmannian-scheme`. Author `\label`/`\lean`/`\uses` entries (planner owns prose):
- `GrassChart`, `GrassVars`, `grassChart`, `grassChartRing` — chart data (steps 1–3).
- `grassFrame` (uses `MvPolynomial.X`, embedding inj.), `grassFrame_minor_self`,
  `grassMinor`, `grassMinor_self` (uses `Matrix.det_one`).
- `grassOverlapRing`, `grassOverlap`, `grassInclusion` (uses
  `instIsOpenImmersionMapOfHomAwayAlgebraMap`).
- `grassFrameLoc`, `grassMinorMatrixLoc`, `grassMinorMatrixLoc_det` (uses `Matrix.submatrix_map`,
  `RingHom.map_det`), `grassMinorMatrixLoc_isUnit_det` (uses `IsLocalization.Away.algebraMap_isUnit`).
- `grassTransMatrix`, `grassTransMatrix_submatrix_self` (uses `Matrix.nonsing_inv_mul`),
  `grassTransAux`, `grassTransAux_map_frame` (uses `MvPolynomial.eval₂Hom_X'`,
  `grassTransMatrix_submatrix_self`), `grassTransAux_minor_isUnit` (uses `RingHom.map_det`,
  `Matrix.det_nonsing_inv`, `IsUnit.ringInverse`, `grassFrame_minor_self`).
- `grassTrans` (uses `Localization.awayLift`), `grassTransMorphism` (GlueData `t`).

### P1.2 STRUCTURAL: 3 undefined blueprint macros (blueprint-doctor) — will crash `leanblueprint web`
- `Basic.tex`: `\NN`, `\relproj` used, defined nowhere.
- `Functors.tex`: `\range` used, defined nowhere.
Fix as in iter-005's `\grass` fix — add `\providecommand` to `common.tex`/`macros` or correct the
typo. Do NOT defer; next web build crashes until resolved.

## P2 — Finish `grassmannianScheme := D.glued` (HIGHEST VALUE, axiom-free, all infra in hand)
NOT a Mathlib gap. `Scheme.GlueData` + needed lemmas exist. Remaining fields, decomposition in-code
above the def:
1. `f_id : IsIso (grassInclusion I I)` — from `grassMinor_self` (`P^I_I=1`); localization away from a
   unit is iso (`IsLocalization.atUnits` / Away-of-unit).
2. `t_id : grassTransMorphism I I = 𝟙` — `grassMinorMatrixLoc I I = 1` ⟹ `grassTransMatrix I I = X^I`
   ⟹ `grassTrans I I = RingHom.id` ⟹ `Spec.map 𝟙 = 𝟙`.
3. `t'` triple-overlap morphism (DATA) + `t_fac` + `cocycle` — `f_hasPullback` automatic (open
   immersions); discharge entrywise from already-proven `grassmannian_cocycle`.
The single hardest obstacle (transition-map well-definedness gate `grassTransAux_minor_isUnit`) is
CLOSED this iter. Re-dispatch the same lane; reversal risk is low.

## P3 — relativeProj BUILD (planner-owed definitional decision, gates `frontier`)
Settle the `relativeProj (S) (_V)` signature (planner's owed item from iter-005/006):
**lean toward (a) re-sign `_V` to locally-free/coherent** (covers Nitsure's ℙ(V) projective-bundle
use, cheap per chart; avoids deep sheaf-`Sym`). `relativeProj` is NOT protected. Until this lands,
`frontier` stays 0 and all EGA-III §5/§6 bodies stay gap-blocked.

## Do NOT re-assign (blocked / correct-to-skip)
- `quot_properness` (2nd conjunct) — gap-blocked on `IsSeparated (relativeProj.structureMorphism)`;
  the relativeProj stub is `sorryAx`-valued, has NO provable properties. Only the BUILD closes it.
- `flatness_local_criterion` (part 2) — EGA IV 11.1.1 flat-locus openness, confirmed absent from
  Mathlib. Genuine foundational gap.
- All EGA-III §7 / `Rⁱπ_*` / Serre-twist / sheaf-flat / monoidal-`S.Modules` bodies — gap-gated.
- Do NOT assemble a partial `grassmannianScheme := D.glued` with a `sorry` in the `t'` data field
  (junk scheme, banned). Finish the data fields (P2) before assembling `D`.

## Reusable proof patterns (this iter)
- **Non-square frame matrices:** use plain `Matrix.map` for entrywise ring-hom application;
  `RingHom.mapMatrix` is square-only. Reserve `RingHom.map_det`/`mapMatrix` for the square minor.
- **`def` bodies in proofs:** `rw` fails ("equation theorems"); use `unfold` / `simp only [theDef]`
  / `show … from rfl`.
- **`ext` on `MvPolynomial`-valued matrices** over-recurses into `MvPolynomial.coeff`; use
  `refine Matrix.ext fun … => ?_`; prefer `change` over `show`.
- **Proof-irrelevant subtype goals** (`X ⟨q,a⟩ = X ⟨q,b⟩`): don't assert the subtype proof; unfold +
  `rw [dif_neg, eval₂Hom_X']` carries it symbolically and closes by defeq.
- **Localization transition map via gate:** `Localization.awayLift f r hUnit` lifts a polynomial-level
  ring hom past the localized element once `IsUnit (f r)` is proven — the gate pattern for GlueData `t`.
